title: Crafter Setup By Alatic
description: Configure which crafter slots are enabled or disabled and have that layout applied automatically whenever you open a crafter.
body:
**Crafter Setup By Alatic**
Set which crafter slots are on or off and have that layout applied whenever you open a crafter.

**Features**
3×3 slot selector – choose which slots are enabled (green) or disabled (gray)
Auto-apply – your saved layout is applied when you open any crafter
Config is saved locally in config/crafter_setup_slots.dat
Multiplayer – your layout is sent to the server when you join and when you save

**How to Use**
Press ` (backtick key, next to 1) to open the setup screen
Left-click the grid slots to toggle enabled/disabled
Click Done to save and close
Open any crafter – your layout will be applied automatically

**Requirements**
Minecraft 1.21.11
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
